Differential Data Analysis postprocessing

Uwe Schwartz

02/10/2024

Dependencies & Libraries

Load packages

library(DESeq2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggrepel)
library(tidyverse)
library(Vennerable)
#palette(unique(c(brewer.pal(9,"Set1"),brewer.pal(8,"Set2"))))
load("/Users/admin///Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Organisation_NAC/Cooperate_Design/colors/nac_palette_extend.rda")
palette(nac_palette_extend)

##Import data H77L vs Ctrl at DMSO

# load  H77L data
H77L.res<-read.delim("data/H77L.DMSO_vs_Ctrl.DMSO/res_table.txt")
head(H77L.res)

## get signif. p.th<-0.001. logFC<-2
H77L.signif<-read.delim("Analysis/01_volcano_plots/signif_genes_H77L_Ctrl_DMSO.txt")
dim(H77L.signif)
## [1] 295  43
# load C118F data
C118F.res<-read.delim("data/C118F.DMSO_vs_Ctrl.DMSO/res_table.txt")
## get signif. p.th<-0.001. logFC<-2
C118F.signif<-read.delim("Analysis/01_volcano_plots/signif_genes_C118F_Ctrl_DMSO.txt")
dim(C118F.signif)
## [1] 342  43
#

## load rlog normed data
load("/Volumes/PromisePegasus/_Service_/S040_Kidney_RNAseq/240318_RNAseq/DESeq/obj/rld.rda")

Heatmap

#merge all signif gene
any.signif<-unique(c(C118F.signif$EnsemblID,H77L.signif$EnsemblID))
length(any.signif)
## [1] 393
# get only DMSO samples
metaData<-colData(rld) %>% 
    as.tibble() %>% 
    filter(treatment == "DMSO") 


mat<-assay(rld)[any.signif,metaData$id]
dim(mat)
## [1] 393  18
anno<-metaData %>% 
    column_to_rownames('id') %>% 
    select(genotype)

#sort by genotype
id.Ctrl<-metaData %>% filter(genotype=="Ctrl") %>% pull(id)
id.C118F<-metaData %>% filter(genotype=="C118F") %>% pull(id)
id.H77L<-metaData %>% filter(genotype=="H77L") %>% pull(id)

ordCol<-c(id.Ctrl, id.C118F, id.H77L)


## set colors meta data
anno_colors=list()

#set genotype color
cond.col<-levels(metaData$genotype)
#anno_colors[["genotype"]]<-c("#e3d19c","#40606d","#c4024d")
anno_colors[["genotype"]]<-c("#e9de97","#75bca9","#ef7923")
names(anno_colors[["genotype"]])<-cond.col


# how sig genes
anno_genes<-data.frame(
    signif.H77L=as.factor(any.signif %in% H77L.signif$EnsemblID),
    signif.C118F=as.factor(any.signif %in% C118F.signif$EnsemblID),
    row.names=any.signif
)

# order rows
# group genes to up and down regulated groups
genes.down<-apply(mat[,id.Ctrl], 1,mean) / apply(mat[,c(id.H77L,id.C118F)], 1,mean) >1

#check order
all.equal(rownames(anno_genes),rownames(mat))
## [1] TRUE
#make ordering index
idx.venn<-as.numeric(anno_genes$signif.H77L)*0.8 + as.numeric(anno_genes$signif.C118F)

down.reg.genes<-rownames(anno_genes[genes.down,])[order(idx.venn[genes.down])]
up.reg.genes<-rownames(anno_genes[!genes.down,])[order(idx.venn[!genes.down])]


anno_colors[["signif.C118F"]]<-c("#8E8E8D","white")
names(anno_colors[["signif.C118F"]])<-c("TRUE","FALSE")
anno_colors[["signif.H77L"]]<-c("#8E8E8D","white")
names(anno_colors[["signif.H77L"]])<-c("TRUE","FALSE")

pheatmap(mat[c(down.reg.genes,rev(up.reg.genes)),ordCol],scale="row",
         cluster_cols = F,show_rownames  = F, cluster_rows = F,
         breaks = seq(-2.5,2.5,length.out= 101), annotation_col = anno,
         annotation_colors =anno_colors,show_colnames = F,
         annotation_row = anno_genes,
      color = colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(n = 7, name ="RdBu")))(100)) 

# get Venns

#down.reg
H77L.down<-anno_genes[genes.down,] %>% 
    filter(signif.H77L==TRUE) %>% 
    rownames()

C118F.down<-anno_genes[genes.down,] %>% 
    filter(signif.C118F==TRUE) %>% 
    rownames()

down.reg.venn<-list("C118F.down"=C118F.down,
     "H77L.down"=H77L.down)

V.plot<-Venn(down.reg.venn)

plot(V.plot, show = list(SetLabels = T,
 Faces = F, DarkMatter = F))

#up.reg
H77L.up<-anno_genes[!genes.down,] %>% 
    filter(signif.H77L==TRUE) %>% 
    rownames()

C118F.up<-anno_genes[!genes.down,] %>% 
    filter(signif.C118F==TRUE) %>% 
    rownames()

up.reg.venn<-list("C118F.up"=C118F.up,
     "H77L.up"=H77L.up)

V.plot2<-Venn(up.reg.venn)

plot(V.plot2, show = list(SetLabels = T,
 Faces = F, DarkMatter = F))
